title: FSL Editor / Visualizer — feature inventory for rewrite

status_legend.existing: Present and working in jssm-viz-demo today
status_legend.broken: Exists in the UI but does not function (or is wired to nothing)
status_legend.dead: DOM element / code path exists but is unreferenced / unreachable
status_legend.new: Not in jssm-viz-demo today; proposed for the rewrite

items.title: Live FSL code editor
items.notes: Ace editor occupying one half of the viewport, currently fixed 50/50 split.

items.title: FSL syntax highlighting
items.notes: Provided by Ace's mode-fsl.js. Rewrite will need an equivalent grammar definition for the chosen editor.

items.title: Live autocomplete
items.notes: Ace's enableLiveAutocompletion: true.

items.title: Editor font-size up / down buttons (T ↑ / T ↓)
items.notes: Floor of 3px; starts at 21px; no explicit upper cap.

items.title: Editor color theme picker
items.notes: ~38 Ace themes; default solarized_dark; persisted to localStorage as PrevTheme.

items.title: Browser shortcut passthrough (Ctrl/Cmd-R, T, L)
items.notes: Intentionally unbinds Ace's bindings for these keys on the FSL editor and on the read-only SVG/DOT panes so browser refresh, new tab, and address bar focus work.

items.title: Editor receives focus and cursor at end on load
Live SVG rendering of the FSL
items.notes: Uses jssm_viz.fsl_to_svg_string.

items.title: Layout engine auto-selection
items.notes: Uses the FSL's graph_layout attribute; defaults to dot.

items.title: Zoom control
items.notes: Number input; scales #svg_target width/height as percent (min 1, step 10, default 100).

items.title: View-mode buttons: Vis / Tree / SVG / DOT
items.notes: Vis = rendered SVG, Tree = parse tree JSON in read-only Ace, SVG = raw SVG source in read-only Ace, DOT = generated Graphviz DOT in read-only Ace. Active button highlighted.

items.title: Export PNG button
items.notes: Button #png_btn exists in the DOM but is not wired to any handler.

items.title: Palette button (🎨)
items.notes: Button #addPalette exists in the DOM but is not wired to any handler. Intent unclear.

items.title: Editor rotation button (🔄)
items.notes: Cycles six layouts: edRight (default) -> edBottom -> edLeft -> edTop -> edOnly (editor only) -> edOff (viz only). Persisted to localStorage as PrevRot.

items.title: Add Header button (☰)
items.notes: Prepends a canonical FSL header block (machine_name, machine_author, machine_license, machine_comment, machine_language, machine_version, fsl_version, start_states, end_states) to the editor content.

items.title: Help button (?)
items.notes: Slides in a right-side help panel.

items.title: Foldable help-panel sections
items.notes: Clicking an h1 collapses its dl; arrow glyph toggles. Sections start folded.

items.title: Help panel topic content
items.notes: Active topics: Transitions, Actions, Spread, Machine Attributes. Commented out in HTML: Probability, Named Ordered Sets, Stripes, Cycles, Timeouts.

items.title: Built-in example machines picker
items.notes: Traffic Light, Sequential Function Chart, Unit Chains, TCP/IP. Each is inlined as a JS string with a url pointer to the canonical .fsl in the jssm repo.

items.title: Selecting an example replaces editor contents and re-renders
URL-based load of FSL source
items.notes: ?s=<lzstring-base64> decompresses via LZString.decompressFromEncodedURIComponent on cold start. Falls back to the Traffic Light example.

items.title: View link (🌎)
items.notes: Opens https://fsl.tools/viewer/?z=<compressed>. Updated on every edit.

items.title: Editor link (👨🏽‍💻)
items.notes: Opens ?s=<compressed> on the same editor. Updated on every edit.

items.title: Status readout bar
items.notes: Bottom strip: 'Line N col M out of L lines    N states; M transitions; K actions'. Updates on cursor move and after every successful parse.

items.title: Error display
items.notes: Parse failure shows message + start:col -> end:col in the bottom bar; bar turns red via the showError class.

items.title: Inline error markers in the editor
items.notes: Red errorRange underline at the failing span via Ace markers and annotations; cleared on successful parse.

items.title: Console version log on load
items.notes: Prints jssm, jssm-viz, and jssm-viz-demo versions and build timestamps to console.log.

items.title: FSL source is NOT persisted across reloads
items.notes: Only the URL share mechanism preserves work; reloading without ?s= loses the editor contents. Strong candidate to fix in the rewrite (see new__autosave_fsl).

items.title: Five-pane layout: SVG | PNG | Parse Tree | JSON(make) | DOT
items.notes: Uses require() and references jssm.es5.cjs.min.js + jssm-viz.es5.cjs.js which are NOT copied by npm run clone, so the page does not function as deployed.

items.title: Plain <textarea> editor (no Ace), live-updating on keyup
Loads the traffic-light cycle as default
Side-by-side PNG-only renderer with Ace editor
items.notes: Ace is loaded in monokai theme and javascript mode (not FSL) — appears unintentional. Same missing-file problem as language_explorer.html.

items.title: graphist_.html — minimal Ace stub, no rendering
items.notes: Looks like a sketch / WIP that never finished.

items.title: npm run cloneace — copies Ace runtime, modes (fsl, javascript, svg, dot), every theme, and workers from node_modules
npm run version — generates docs/version.js with version + build_time
npm run changelog — regenerates CHANGELOG.md via better_git_changelog
GitHub Pages deployment from docs/
items.notes: Deployed at https://stonecypher.github.io/jssm-viz-demo/graph_explorer.html

groups.title: Proposed new features for the rewrite (NEW)

items.title: Auto-save FSL to localStorage
items.notes: Survives reload without depending on the URL share mechanism.

items.title: Working PNG export
items.notes: Wire up (or replace) the existing button.

items.title: Copy buttons for share URL, SVG source, DOT source, parse tree
Open / save .fsl file from / to disk
Resizable splitter between editor and viz
items.notes: Today the editor/viz split is fixed 50/50 per layout mode.

items.title: Modern editor: CodeMirror 6 (decided 2026-05-12)
items.notes: Decided CM6 after a survey of Monaco / CM5 / Ace / Lexical / TipTap / Slate / CodeJar+Shiki / Theia / Sandpack. Rationale: bundle size irrelevant (viz.js WASM already multi-MB), strongest custom-language story via Lezer for future grammar work, best a11y/mobile story. Working sketch at sketch/cm6-editor/ and sketch/cm6-lang-fsl/ (StreamLanguage tokenizer + fsl_parser linter).

items.title: Publish cm6-lang-fsl as the jssm/cm6 subpath
items.notes: Reuse the StreamLanguage tokenizer from sketch/cm6-lang-fsl/ as the jssm/cm6 subpath export. Exports fslLanguage and fsl(). Shape matches standard @codemirror/lang-* packages so any CM6 consumer can `import { fsl } from 'jssm/cm6'`. Future escalation path: hand-written tokenizer -> auto-derived from PEG terminals -> full Lezer grammar.

items.title: Ship CM6 importmap pattern for CDN consumers
items.notes: Document and bake the pinned-version + ?external= chain importmap pattern into the CDN docs for <jssm-editor>. Two real bugs to avoid: (1) the `codemirror` meta package on esm.sh drops re-exports — compose basicSetup manually; (2) jsdelivr's +esm shortcut inlines @codemirror/state in each package, breaking instanceof. Reference sketch HTML at sketch/cm6-editor/index.html.

items.title: Dark/light chrome theme (not just the editor)
Examples loaded from jssm/src/machines/*.fsl dynamically
items.notes: Fewer drift opportunities than inlined JS strings.

items.title: Interactive playback / step-through
items.notes: Pick a start state, click actions/transitions to step; current state highlighted in the SVG.

items.title: Outline panel of states / actions / transitions, click-to-jump
Mobile / narrow-viewport layout
items.notes: Current app assumes desktop width.

items.title: Decide the fate of language_explorer and graphist
items.notes: Either fix as a unified 'Inspector' tab in the main app or drop entirely.
